description: A new lot of a critical raw material has arrived and must be tested and released by QC before it can be used in production.

nodes.task_description: Log the receipt of the new material lot in the inventory system, which should automatically place it in 'Quarantine' status.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a new inventory record for the lot with a 'Quarantine' status.

nodes.task_description: Take a sample of the material and submit it to the QC lab for incoming inspection testing.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a new sample record and testing order in the LIMS.

nodes.task_description: After QC testing is complete and approved, change the status of the inventory lot from 'Quarantine' to 'Available'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives notification of QC approval and successfully updates the inventory status.
